testing.reason: No test runner installed. package.json has no test script and no test dependencies (jest, vitest, playwright, cypress, etc.). No test files found anywhere in the project.

conventions.architecture: Clean/Hexagonal-inspired — role-based atomic folder structure (ui/, sections/, layout/, animations/)
conventions.server_client_boundary: Server by default. Client components are thin leaves only — 6 'use client' files total.
conventions.data_layer: Typed static TypeScript files in lib/data/ with i18n-ready interfaces (Record<string, string>)
conventions.theming: CSS variables + class-based dark mode toggle with FOUC prevention inline script
conventions.animation_rule: Only opacity and transform animated. whileInView + once:true. prefers-reduced-motion respected.
conventions.seo: generateMetadata() per page, JSON-LD in root layout, static sitemap.ts + robots.ts
conventions.component_pattern: Container-Presentational — server sections receive data as props, client wrappers provide animation shells

phase.next_recommended: sdd-explore (for additional changes) or continue apply phases if premium-coffee-shop has remaining tasks
